task_summary: Implemented user authentication flow including login, signup, and password reset forms with JWT-based session management.
change_summary: Added 3 new form components (LoginForm, SignupForm, ResetPassword), auth API client module, and FormField shared component. 47 new tests covering auth paths.

specialist_reviews.summary: All acceptance criteria verified. Minor concern about login rate limiting logged as non-blocking.
Token storage approach is sound. API client structure follows existing patterns. No architectural concerns.

known_risks: Token refresh path not E2E tested
Password reset email uses mock backend

items: Token refresh expiry edge case not covered by E2E tests
Password reset email backend is stubbed — requires backend task to complete

concerns: Token storage in localStorage may be vulnerable to XSS; consider httpOnly cookie approach in follow-up
